content.full_text:
September 20, 1991

California Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J Street, Suite 800
Sacramento, CA 95804-0807

Dear Sir,

I have previously written letters inquiring about information pertaining to the filing periods and to the fact of our treasurer abruptly resigning.

My concern is about the outstanding loans that was incurred during the campaign. How can we pay the loans? Can we use campaign contribution and personal monies to pay the loans? Can a portion of the loan or all of the loan be forgiven? Is there a penalty involved with the forgiveness of loans? Can we continue to request campaign contributions as a elected official and what is the time frame in requesting campaign contributions?

Certainly would appreciate your response to these concerns.

Sincerely,

Loystene L. Irvin
Board of Education - Seat 5
Inglewood Unified School District
10236 - 2nd Avenue
Inglewood, CA 90303

(213) 754-1448
